NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL.description: Backend API URL (e.g., https://api.example.com or http://localhost:8000 for local dev)

PYTHON_SERVICE_URL.description: Python service URL for satellite analysis (e.g., https://python-service.example.com)

GOOGLE_API_KEY.description: Google API key for Generative AI

SMTP_HOST.description: SMTP server host for email alerts

SMTP_FROM.description: Email address to send alerts from
